title: Genral Care
info: Comprehensive primary healthcare, regular wellness checkups, and preventive screenings for all age groups.

title: Pathalogy Lab
info: State-of-the-art diagnostic laboratory providing accurate blood tests, biochemistry analysis, and culture screenings.

title: Dental Care
info: Advanced dental procedures including scaling, painless root canal treatments, capping, implants, and orthodontic care.

title: 24X7 Emergency
info: Immediate critical care support with fully equipped ICU setups, trauma response teams, and 24/7 ambulance services.

title: heart Issue
info: Specialized cardiology consultations, ECG trackers, eco-cardiography, and management of cardiovascular health parameters.

title: Neurology
info: Advanced clinical neurological tracking for severe migraines, neuromuscular complications, and spinal problems.

title: Rhematology
info: Dedicated treatment for bone health, chronic arthritis conditions, joint pain management, and autoimmune muscle disorders.

title: Eye Care
info: Advanced ophthalmology clinic for computer-vision syndrome checkups, cataract screenings, and prescription lens testing.
